data.content: Centralized workflow action prompt rendering into src/action_prompt.rs so claim, poll, peek, and run-skill now read only profile-installed prompt bodies. Removed the runtime fallback to src/skills.rs, made state-name skill lookup resolve against the current workflow's default profile, and added loom/knots_sdlc/prompts/evaluating.md so gate evaluation also uses a workflow-installed Loom prompt. Added regression coverage for custom workflow prompt lookup plus updated builtin compatibility prompt assertions. Validation: cargo test run_commands::tests; cargo test poll_claim::tests_ext2; make sanity (95.20% coverage).
